title: What the hells up with Ritsuko and coffee
display_title: What the hells up with Ritsuko and coffee
wikitext:
[]: What the hell's up with Ritsuko and coffee?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Aug 06, 2008 11:06 pm Every scene I can think of in the series involving coffee or a coffeemaker (except for in End of Eva) involves Ritsuko, starting around here in episode 2: http://www.evacommentary.org/episode-02/02_C072a.jpg Why does she get all the coffee emphasis? Is it meant to be a contrast to Misato's beer? >_> uppers and downers?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Aug 06, 2008 11:18 pm Keep in mind that Misato has switched to coffee by the end of the series.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Aug 06, 2008 11:22 pm That's true. I guess her more social side shriveled away after Kaji died. it's hinted that she started a relationship with Hyuga, but it's also pretty obvious that this is just a means to an end.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 06, 2008 11:40 pm For somebody who spends night and day working on computers, with hardly any sleep at all, Coffee can be your best friend.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Aug 07, 2008 12:45 am i think also having like, a coffee machine right at the top level of the Command Center (right up there next to Maya & Co.) is another emphasis on realism: this is a real place that real people actually work in, and they'd rather not hike over a mile to get to a break room that has coffee so they just put the machine next to their work station.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 07, 2008 12:57 am FallenTabris wrote: it's hinted that she started a relationship with Hyuga

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Aug 07, 2008 1:02 am Maybe "relationship" isn't entirely clear, but it's pretty clear she's probably doing him some favors in return for his information towards the end of the series. Her tone and the fact that she uses -kun when telling Hyuga to self-destruct dogma if Kaworu makes it to the azimuth is telling, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Thu Aug 07, 2008 5:51 am Why everyone thinks Misato is a whore?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 07, 2008 7:58 am simon wrote: Why everyone thinks Misato is a whore?

[]:             Quote Post by Zaque » Thu Aug 07, 2008 11:28 am I agree with V as well.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Aug 07, 2008 12:24 pm simon wrote: Why everyone thinks Misato is a whore?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Aug 07, 2008 1:15 pm BrikHaus wrote: Because she is one.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Aug 07, 2008 1:19 pm Zaque wrote: I agree with V as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Thu Aug 07, 2008 1:30 pm So . . . coffee, yeah . . . I think it's cause' Ritsuko just spends so much damn time working. She smokes and she drinks a lot of coffee. She probably needs those fixes to keep from going nuts, aside from the occasional Gendo boink.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Aug 07, 2008 2:08 pm Clearly, the coffee is symbolic of one thing and one thing only. It's the same color as Naoko's hair, so clearly she wants to devour her legacy and courage and "become" Naoko so she can jump Gendo's bones and move onto her next goal...drinking LCL to become Yui. Also it probably represents cocks.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 07, 2008 3:26 pm V wrote: ass for Misato..........I never thought she was "promiscuous"

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Thu Aug 07, 2008 3:49 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Also it probably represents cocks.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Thu Aug 07, 2008 6:09 pm NAveryW wrote: V wrote: ass for Misato..........I never thought she was "promiscuous"

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 07, 2008 6:13 pm V wrote: NAveryW wrote: V wrote: ass for Misato..........I never thought she was "promiscuous"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 07, 2008 6:26 pm V wrote: ass for Misato..........I never thought she was "promiscuous".....

Article: What the hells up with Ritsuko and coffee
't entirely clear, but it's pretty clear she's probably doing him some favors in return for his information towards the end of the series. Her tone and the fact that she uses -kun when telling Hyuga to self-destruct dogma if Kaworu makes it to the azimuth is telling, I think.

She smokes and she drinks a lot of coffee. She probably needs those fixes to keep from going nuts, aside from the occasional Gendo boink.

It's the same color as Naoko's hair, so clearly she wants to devour her legacy and courage and "become" Naoko so she can jump Gendo's bones and move onto her next goal...drinking LCL to become Yui. Also it probably represents cocks.
